cases.title: POST cover-image and GET media/events/{key} honor allowed MIME types and controlled path contract
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Editable event owned by OrganizerAdmin
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT
Valid JPEG, PNG, or WebP image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as multipart/form-data with allowed image file and OrganizerAdmin bearer token
Assert POST returns HTTP 200 or 201 with stable success envelope
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and capture coverImageUrl
Query events row for cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at
GET coverImageUrl (GET /api/v1/media/events/{key})
cases.expected: Upload succeeds; event persists cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at; coverImageUrl resolves under /api/v1/media/events/ controlled route; media GET returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type matching uploaded format (image/jpeg, image/png, or image/webp); satisfies NFR-18 validation and controlled storage serving per API design §2.7

cases.title: Uploaded cover file persisted under configured uploads directory with storage key format
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
UPLOADS_DIR configured per local development setup
Valid image file under 5 MB
Integration harness with real Postgres and filesystem
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with valid image via media service/repository
Read cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at from events row in Postgres
Verify file exists only under UPLOADS_DIR at path derived from key
cases.expected: cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at stored in database; physical file exists under controlled uploads directory; no file written outside configured storage root; NFR-18 controlled storage path requirement met at module-DB boundary

cases.title: Event list and detail coverImageUrl uses API media route not raw filesystem path
preconditions: Event with cover_image_key set from prior valid upload in Postgres
Public or authenticated GET access to event list and detail
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and locate event with cover
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} for same event
Inspect coverImageUrl values in both responses
cases.expected: coverImageUrl values use /api/v1/media/events/{key} pattern; no absolute filesystem paths, file:// URLs, or direct UPLOADS_DIR exposure in API payloads; NFR-18 served-from-controlled-path contract honored for display

cases.title: BRD §1.7 Event Media — organizer uploads validated cover; participant retrieves image only via controlled media URL
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Draft or editable event in organizer scope
OrganizerAdmin JWT and Participant JWT (or public read policy)
Valid WebP image under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as multipart/form-data with valid image and OrganizerAdmin bearer token
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 as participant and read coverImageUrl on list item
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} as participant and read coverImageUrl
GET coverImageUrl and verify bytes and Content-Type
cases.expected: Upload passes MIME and size validation; list and detail expose coverImageUrl under controlled /media/events/ path; participant can fetch image bytes with correct Content-Type; end-to-end NFR-18 validation plus controlled serve path for event media acceptance scope

cases.title: API rejects oversized multipart upload before cover_image_key persistence
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event without cover
Valid MIME image file larger than 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with oversized file
Query events.cover_image_key in Postgres
List files under UPLOADS_DIR for event-scoped keys
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_INPUT and typed error envelope; cover_image_key remains null; no file written under uploads directory; NFR-18 maximum size enforced at API and persistence boundary

cases.title: Media handler serves files only from configured uploads directory via key lookup
preconditions: Valid cover uploaded and cover_image_key known in Postgres
API media handler mounted at GET /media/events/{key}
Integration harness with real uploads directory
steps: GET /api/v1/media/events/{validKey} for uploaded cover
Verify response body matches uploaded bytes and Content-Type header
Confirm handler resolves key to path under UPLOADS_DIR only
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with correct image bytes and Content-Type; file resolved through controlled handler mapping key to UPLOADS_DIR; no arbitrary filesystem read; NFR-18 controlled storage path serving satisfied

cases.title: Each allowed image format returns matching Content-Type on media GET
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and three editable events (or sequential upload/delete)
Valid JPEG, PNG, and WebP fixtures each under 5 MB
steps: Upload JPEG cover; GET media endpoint and record HTTP status and Content-Type
Replace with PNG; GET media endpoint and record HTTP status and Content-Type
Replace with WebP; GET media endpoint and record HTTP status and Content-Type
cases.expected: Media responses return HTTP 200 with image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp respectively; MIME validation contract consistent through serve path per API design §2.7

cases.title: Disallowed MIME type upload rejected with no storage side effects
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Non-image file such as application/pdf or image/gif
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with disallowed file
Verify events.cover_image_key unchanged and uploads directory has no new file for event
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_INPUT; cover_image_key null or unchanged; no orphan file on disk; only image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp accepted per API design §2.7 and NFR-18 MIME validation

cases.title: Cover upload at exactly 5 MB accepted; one byte over rejected
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event without cover
Fixtures: valid WebP at exactly 5_000_000 bytes and at 5_000_001 bytes
steps: POST cover-image with 5 MB file and confirm HTTP 200 or 201
DELETE cover-image to reset
POST cover-image with 5 MB + 1 byte file
cases.expected: At-limit upload succeeds and is servable via media route; over-limit returns HTTP 400 with INVALID_INPUT; boundary enforced consistently per API max 5 MB and NFR-18 size constraint

cases.title: Media route rejects path traversal and invalid keys without filesystem escape
preconditions: API server running with media handler
No valid cover for traversal test keys
steps: GET /api/v1/media/events/../etc/passwd and URL-encoded traversal variants
GET /api/v1/media/events/nonexistent-key-uuid
cases.expected: Traversal attempts return HTTP 404 or 400 with typed error envelope and requestId; no arbitrary filesystem read outside UPLOADS_DIR; invalid keys do not leak directory contents; NFR-18 controlled storage path confinement enforced

cases.title: GET media for deleted cover key returns not found without serving stale file
preconditions: Event with uploaded cover and known cover_image_key
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image
Query events row for cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at
GET /api/v1/media/events/{previousKey}
cases.expected: cover_image_key cleared in database; media GET for removed key returns HTTP 404; file removed or unreachable from controlled handler; no continued serve of deleted cover outside controlled lifecycle

cases.title: Participant cannot upload event cover image
preconditions: Editable event in organizer scope
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT and separate Participant JWT
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with Participant token only
Query events.cover_image_key in database
cases.expected: Participant POST returns HTTP 403 unauthorized; cover_image_key unchanged; create/edit event media mutation restricted to OrganizerAdmin per roles matrix

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied cover image upload on editable event
preconditions: Draft event in OrganizerAdmin organizing unit
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned to event scope
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerStaff bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized; no cover_image_key written; roles matrix restricts create/edit event draft to OrganizerAdmin only

cases.title: Organizer cover upload enforces type and size feedback; participant sees image via controlled URL
preconditions: Web app running with organizer event create/edit form at /organizer/events and participant discovery at /events
OrganizerAdmin logged in; participant session available
Valid JPEG/PNG/WebP under 5 MB and disallowed file (e.g. PDF) for negative check
steps: As OrganizerAdmin, open event form, attempt to select disallowed file type and observe validation feedback
Select valid cover image, complete upload, and confirm preview renders
As participant, open event discovery list at /events and event detail at /events/{eventId} for the same event
cases.expected: Form rejects or warns on disallowed MIME and oversize files before submit; successful upload shows preview; participant list card and detail hero load cover from API media URL (not raw filesystem path); broken-image fallback absent for valid upload; NFR-18 validation and controlled serve path visible in UI journey

cases.title: Organizer form blocks oversize cover selection with clear error before API call
preconditions: Web app event form with client-side or immediate server validation for cover upload
OrganizerAdmin logged in on editable event
Image fixture larger than 5 MB
steps: Open event edit form cover upload control
Select file exceeding 5 MB maximum
Attempt to save or upload
cases.expected: UI surfaces size-limit error with immediate feedback; no successful cover persistence; participant views unchanged; aligns with NFR-18 maximum size constraint at user-facing boundary

cases.title: Malformed multipart upload rejected at API validation gate
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Multipart request with missing file part or unsupported Content-Type on file field
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with empty multipart body
POST with file field but unsupported or missing Content-Type declaration
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_INPUT and typed error envelope; no cover_image_key persisted; malformed uploads cannot bypass NFR-18 MIME validation gate
